zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Legate於1614年出生在英國肯特托布利其時，她的父親Richard Legatt45歲，母親Joane43歲。她於大約1637年與Robert John Morris在英國貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1679年5月5日在英國貝德福爾沙恩布盧可享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Legate于1614年出生在英国肯特托布利其时，她的父亲Richard Legatt45岁，母亲Joane43岁。她于大约1637年与Robert John Morris在英国貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1679年5月5日在英国貝德福爾沙恩布盧可享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Legate
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a medieval personal name, a variant of   Legard   1 or   Leger   1.
French: probably a topographic name, with fused masculine definite article le, derived from Old French gast ‘waste land, fallow’ (see Gast ).

variants.name: Leggett
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English legat, legate ‘delegate, ambassador, deputy’ (Old French legat), Latin legatus ‘one who is appointed or ordained’.
English: variant of   Legard  , especially in Sussex, perhaps through confusion of the two names.

variants.name: Legates
meanings: Altered form of English   Legate   (see   Leggett  ). Compare   Lecates  .

variants.name: Lecates
meanings: Altered form of English Legate (see Leggett ), via the intermediate forms Lecat(t) and Lecate. Compare Legates and Lekites .

History: John Lecatt was born in VA in the 1630s or 1640s. His descendants also bear the surnames Lecates, Legates, Lekites, etc. The family lived first in Accomack County, VA. By the 1790s most had moved north to MD and DE.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Legate was born in 1614, in Tonbridge, Kent, England, her father, Richard Legatt, was 45 and her mother, Joane, was 43. She married Robert John Morris about 1637, in Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 5 May 1679, in Sharnbrook, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Legate est née en 1614, à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Richard Legatt, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Joane, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Robert John Morris environ 1637, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1679, à Sharnbrook, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Legate 1614 in Tonbridge, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Legatt 45 und ihre Mutter Joane 43. Sie hat um 1637 in Bedfordshire, England Robert John Morris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1679 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Sharnbrook, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Legate è nata il nel 1614 nel Tonbridge, Kent, England, sua padre, Richard Legatt, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Joane, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Robert John Morris circa 1637, nel Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 maggio 1679, nel Sharnbrook, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Legateが1614年にイギリスケントトンブリッジで生まれた時，父Richard Legattは45歳，母Joaneは43歳であった。約1637年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでRobert John Morrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1679年5月5日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアシャルンブルークで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Legate(이)가 1614년 영국 켄트 토브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Legatt(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 1637년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 Robert John Morris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1679년 5월 5일 영국 베드퍼드실르 샤른브룩에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Legate nasceu em 1614, em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Legatt, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joane, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert John Morris aproximadamente 1637, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de maio de 1679, em Sharnbrook, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Legate родилась в 1614 г. в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Legatt было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert John Morris около 1637 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 5 мая 1679 г. в местности шарнбрук, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Legate nació en 1614, en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Legatt, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Joane, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Robert John Morris aproximadamente 1637, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1679, en Sharnbrook, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
